insight: pub/sub handlers that retrieve memory_key from event payload will race with the preceding memory_store unless publishEvent() is explicitly gated on memory_store() returning success
HITL threshold rule affecting-humans-outside-company is operationally unbounded for Sales/Marketing agents; replace with direct comm to named individual not in existing thread
multi-agent systems using shared memory keys with entity IDs must define a canonical ID source before integrations are wired; CRM-assigned ID is the natural anchor for lead-based workflows

When using Supabase for workflows with pending/resolved states, make resolution fields (decision, rationale) nullable rather than NOT NULL + CHECK(length>0). UI validation handles the required-before-submit contract; DB constraint handles only the data-integrity guarantee for completed records.

Single-file HTML prototypes opened via file:// cannot make fetch() calls to external HTTPS endpoints due to browser CORS restrictions. Mandate python3 -m http.server or Netlify Drop for all single-file prototypes intended to call external APIs.
